entities.description: A review item managed by the Solo operator.

fields.description: The content of the review paste by the operator.
fields.name: content

fields.description: The sentiment extracted from the review's content.
fields.name: sentiment

fields.description: List of issues identified in the review.
fields.name: issues

fields.description: The draft reply prepared for this review.
fields.name: replyDraft

fields.description: List of action items derived from the review.
fields.name: actionItems

invariants: If 'sentiment' is set, then 'issues' should not be empty.
entities.name: Review

entities.description: A tag assigned to an issue identified in a review.

fields.description: Unique identifier for the issue tag.
fields.name: id

fields.description: The name of the issue tag.
fields.name: name

fields.description: Additional description or context for the issue tag.
fields.name: description

invariants: 'name' should be unique within the system.
entities.name: IssueTag

entities.description: A draft reply prepared for a review.

fields.description: Unique identifier for the reply draft.
fields.name: id

fields.description: The content of the draft reply.
fields.name: content

invariants: 'content' should not be empty if intended to send.
entities.name: ReplyDraft

entities.description: An action item derived from a review.

fields.description: Unique identifier for the action item.
fields.name: id

fields.description: The description of the action item.
fields.name: description

fields.description: Current status of the action item.
fields.name: status

entities.name: ActionItem

entities.description: The current status of a review thread.

fields.description: Unique identifier for the thread status.
fields.name: id

fields.description: The current status of the review thread.
fields.name: status

invariants: 'status' should reflect the latest resolution effort.
entities.name: ThreadStatus

enums.description: Possible sentiments that can be extracted from a review.
enums.name: Sentiment

enums.description: Possible statuses for an action item derived from a review.
enums.name: ActionStatus

enums.description: Possible statuses for a review thread.
enums.name: ThreadStatus

relationships.description: A review can have multiple associated issue tags.
A review can have one reply draft prepared for it.
A review can lead to multiple action items.
A review belongs to a single thread status.
